headline: Utility ETFs to Bet on as We Enter the Age of Electricity
summary: ETFs like XLU offer diversified exposure to utilities as AI, EVs and electrification drive a global surge in power demand.

headline: Vistra Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates as Hedging Fortifies Visibility

headline: The Southern Company (SO) Price Target Raised Following Better-than-Expected Q1 Report
summary: The Southern Company (NYSE:SO) is included among the 12 Best Electric Utility Stocks to Buy for the Data Center Surge. The Southern Company (NYSE:SO) is one of the largest producers of electricity in the United States and the largest wholesale provider in the Southeast.
